entry.title: Re: SAP IAS BP

So, if I understand correctly, your recommendation is to use the Test IAS for the test environment and the prod-AS for both the dev and prod environments?

We don't have a sandbox environment.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content:
I have read recently somewhere that you have to do always a GET first to retrieve the XSRF token that you have to add to the header for the POST/PATCH actions on the Odata Service. But not remember if this is always the same or only in certain circumstances.

Wondering how this can be achieved by SAP PO easily - Better to think about Cloud Integration ...

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS BP
entry.content: I suggest to use the Test IAS only for Sandbox and the Production IAS for all other Subaccounts.

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020 Ole Object retain design size and aspect ratio
entry.content:
For many years we have used the Crystal 11.5 crviewer.dll and craxdrt.dll to allow dynamic display of images within a report in a fixed sized Ole Object. As each row was processed we read the image and resized it to maintain its aspect ratio and loaded it into the Ole Object. 

We are now looking to ship a 64bit viewer and have Crystal 2020 with the .Net Visual Studio Developer packs. It appears that you can no longer access the report engine to do row by row processing. When using the Report design tool you are able to set the Graphic Location to one of the data source columns and then select the Respect Scaling option in the Display method. This forces Can Grow to be turned on which means that the Ole object will grow to the actual image size.

We deal with art galleries and museums and they tend to have single page reports which an image at the top and related data at the bottom. With the Can Grow option set this is not possible.

How am I able to either get access to the report engine to replicate the existing functionality that we have or how am I able to achieve this using the Crystal 2020 Ole Object? i.e how can variable sized images be displayed in a fixed size Ole Object with their correct aspect ratio maintained?

entry.title: Re: Can't create destination service for a UI5 app for Build Work Zone
entry.content: Why don't you give your destination a name? How would you expect to use a destination without a name?

entry.title: Overall status of sales order (IC -CTAD) showing irrevalent even after applying reason of rejection.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good Day.!

We are unable to keep overall status of sales order as completed after applying reason for rejection for item category CTAD. Once applying reason for rejection sale order overall status has become “Not relevant” instead of” completed”. PFA attached document for reference.

Thanks and regards,

Akash Kadam

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
Re: USER_CATALOGS table not filled
entry.content:
The table/CDS view can be filled as follows:

  1. Enterprise Resource Planning Blogs by SAP (This blog describes the approach very well)
    https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-create-business-users-in-sap-s-4hana/ba-p/13580853
  2. Once created, you can now find the user in the ‘Default Settings for Users - Purchase Requisitions’ app
    In the lower ‘Assigned Catalogs’ area, you can now fill in the USER_CATALOGS table/CDS view.

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content:
Yes, that's exactly right. I want to configure it as like that.
TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS.~ < ALLOW
TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS/UI.~ < ALLOW
TEST-ROUTER.CFAPPS/API.~ < ALLOW
TEST-UI.CFAPPS.~ < DENY
TEST-BACKEND.CFAPPS.~ < DENY

entry.title: Re: How to read/write SAP CPI Datastore from Groovy
entry.content: Awesome this works even in message mappings and simplified my integration flow a lot. The alternative was to use Data store Variables in content modifiers, this is better!

entry.title: IE05 only 1 value can be shown for a given multi value characteristics
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

it is observed as an issue that ONLY 1 characteristics value can be shown in IE05 for characteristics with multi values.

Fig 1. Characteristics

Fig 2.

2 Values maintained in Equipment

Fig 3. In IE05 only the 2nd/last value can be displayed.

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content: If I knew, the problem wouldn't occur 😉

entry.title: Re: Technical details - HANA licensing
entry.content:
Hi Srikanth,

as always with SAP licenses: It depends.

If you pull the data through an API from the S/4HANA system, this is classic Indirect Use.

However, if you are already licensed with SAP Digital Access, this Indirect Use will not be subject to additional license cost, as for Digital Access only the amount of documents created in the system will be charged.

If you are not licensed with SAP Digital Access, this Indirect Use will have to be licensed. I suppose that in this case you are in the Named User licensing model of Indirect Use. This would mean that (theoretically) you would have to license all users of the third party system (where the user and role data is used in) with an appropriate SAP Named User license. However, if those users in the third party system already have an SAP Named User license, because they also work in the SAP systems, then they are already licensed and you don't need to get additional Named User licenses.

Hope this helps, but as always with Indirect Use: It depends on the specific use case.

Best regards,

Torben

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting Process for Material Testing in SAP
entry.content: Have you thought about setting up a second order item for a service that you can use to pay the balance for the 2 items?

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content: Token is fine. That part is not the problem. I can clearly see it in the SAP Gateway traces.

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
Hi @Tunir ,

at the moment the feature compatibility of reporting layout in ODE is quite poor (Create Reporting Layouts with Headers, Footers, and Margins | SAP Help Portal😞 The list of features not supported is longer than the list of features being supported!
Scripting for example, which is in my opinion one of the most important features, is not supported!
When will this finally be available?

Best regards and thanks!

entry.title: Re: ATP check for sto purchase orders
entry.content: Hello Jagadeepsingh83, Thankyou for the reply. i couldnot find something like this for in s4 hana public cloud as shown in note. i was able to see only options of 1.Configure Delivery Type & Availability Check Procedure by Plant, 2.Configure Scope of Availability Check(in sales part not in purchase part

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content:
Despite the fact that Cloud Foundry would support Internal container-to-container routes the influencing request Creation of internal routes for container-to-container communication was rejected by SAP.

I highly recommend that if your backend exposes private information you secure it accordingly and use the Approuter to authenticate the end users. You can also serve the static content directly from the approuter. That way you can save some custs for the runtime.

entry.title: Re: How to add reviewer in Manage Workflows for Purchase...

Yes that option is not available for the PO and only available for the PR. Please raise this as missing functionality via influence request.

Additionally, I think reviewing more more sense at PR before those request turns into PO.

Thanks and Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: How to delete existing Planned Independent requirements
entry.content: We will receive forecast from kinaxis daily but before receiving the forecast we need to delete all existing planned independent requirements. How to delete PIRs in mass.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA - Locking issue
entry.content:
Hello I got the same issue and debug.

Issue is due to FORM sperren_mara in include LMG21FSQ whe perform ENQUEUE_EMMARAE 

So I enhance it and remove autolock :

IF my_transaction

    CALL FUNCTION 'ENQUEUE_EMMARAE'
      EXPORTING
          matnr          = mara_keytab-matnr
      EXCEPTIONS
          foreign_lock   = 01
          system_failure = 02.
    IF sy-subrc IS NOT INITIAL
      AND sy-msgv1 EQ sy-uname.
      CALL FUNCTION 'DEQUEUE_EMMARAE'
        EXPORTING
          matnr = mara_keytab-matnr.
      WAIT UP TO 2 SECONDS.
    ENDIF.

    CALL FUNCTION 'ENQUEUE_EMMARAS'
      EXPORTING
          matnr          = mara_keytab-matnr
      EXCEPTIONS
          foreign_lock   = 01
          system_failure = 02.
    IF sy-subrc IS NOT INITIAL
      AND sy-msgv1 EQ sy-uname.
      CALL FUNCTION 'DEQUEUE_EMMARAS'
        EXPORTING
          matnr = mara_keytab-matnr.
      WAIT UP TO 2 SECONDS.
    ENDIF.

Regards

entry.title: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content: I would like to know which API to call and which communication scenario to configure in the 'Communication Arrangements' so I can retrieve the results shown in the attached image. I used 'API_MATERIAL_DOCUMENT_SRV,' but the results I found seem different.

entry.title: Re: REST vs. OData in SAP PO
entry.content:
SOLUTION found: the problem was in my mapping. I pushed all in 1 block. Different messages were put in A_SlsPrcgConditionRecordType.
Now, I changed the mapping and individual messages are put in batchChangeSetPart. That was the key to success.

entry.title: Re: How to reduce the number of parallel deletion processes in FI_DOCUMNT archiving object
entry.content:
you can look into below options

1. change customizing & set delete jobs to not scheduled, later run the delete jobs manually with SARA - delete (select the sessions & files manually)

there is a software which overcomes all such challenges by automation of the entire archiving process https://www.tjc-group.com/asc/

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
I believe your option is the correct one. EXCEPT/MINUS is what I would use for efficiency reasons. I would discard the JOIN due to its poorer performance in HANA compared to columnar operations.

Perhaps you could consider creating a HASH of the row using something like HASH_MD5() and comparing them instead of using all the columns. However, I’m not sure if you would gain anything from this. Try creating a PLAN and evaluate the costs for comparison.

The more fields that are indexed, the faster the performance will be.

Another thing you could do is run the process in batches, using an indexed field or a primary key. For example, you could first compare the records from the year 2024, then 2023, and so on, using SQL Script.

Regards,

entry.title: Change logs in IS-U
entry.content:
Experts,

I would like to have an option to see the changes done in EA40 Tcode. Currently I can see created by, created on, changed by and changed on details in EA40. If we take Purchase orders (ME23N), we have an option to see detailed log - When was the PO changed, who changed it, which fields were changed, old value before change and value after change. Do we have a similar feature for ISU transactions? If not, how do you usually generate change logs in ISU. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content:
My code are as follow：
  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'S'.  "同步更新
  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK 
CALL TRANSACTION 'VA05' USING bdcdata[] OPTIONS FROM ctu_parameters
     MESSAGES INTO lt_message .

And then i change the code as follow，It still doesn't take effect
 *  DATA: ctu_parameters TYPE ctu_params.
*  ctu_parameters-dismode = 'N'.  "后台更新模式
*  ctu_parameters-updmode = 'L'.  "后台更新
*  ctu_parameters-defsize = 'X'.  "默认大小
*  ctu_parameters-racommit = 'X'. "No abortion by COMMIT WORK
*  ctu_parameters-nobinpt = 'X'. "批输入处理活动
*  ctu_parameters-nobiend = 'X'. "批输入处理活动

entry.title: SAP RAP - Create of grandchild is not working/reacting
entry.content:
Hi Community! 🙂

For a longer time we´re facing an issue with our RAP application. We are not able to do a create on a table, which is a grandchild of our root entity

Situation:

  • Root Entity (Location)
  • [0..1] Composition from Location -> Entity Topic (in this case Nature, we have 5 in total)

 

 

composition [0..1] of ZEHS_I_DemoTopic_Nature        as _TopicNatureDemo2

 

 

 

  • [0..*] Composition from Topic -> Entity with table entries

 

 

composition [0..*] of ZEHS_I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE as _InvSpNature

 

 

Location -> [0..1] Location -> [0..*] Table

Behavior Definition:

 

 

// Location
define behavior for I_Location alias Location
lock master
etag master LastChangedDateTime
with unmanaged save
{
  update;

  field ( readonly ) Country, LocationID, CountryText, LocationTypeText, RegionText, Region;

  association _TopicNatureDemo2 { create; }
  }

// Topic
        define behavior for I_DemoTopic_Nature alias DemoTopicNature
        lock dependent by _Location
        with unmanaged save
        {
          update;

          association _InvSpNature { create; }

//          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID;

          association _Location;
        }

// Table inside Topic (_InvSpNature)
        // Invasive Species
        define behavior for I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE alias DemoInvSpNature
        persistent table ...
        lock dependent by _Location
        etag master LastChangeDateTime
        {
          update;
          delete;

          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetInvSpeUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID, LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;

          association _TopicNature;
          association _Location;
        }

 

 

So far we see an ObjectPage with our Section Nature Topic. In this Section, there is also the table with our lineItems.

 

Problem:

We can navigate into the LineItems and delete them, but pressing on the create button is doing nothing. Can someone help us out? We´re struggling with that for a long time now..

Additional Information:
We also developed a Fiori App via BAS and added a custom Navigation to the manifest.json. Navigation and Delete/Update works, create button still doesnt react.

 

 

              "ObjectPage|DemoInvSpNature": {
                "component": {
                  "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage"
                },
                "entitySet": "DemoInvSpNature",
                "navigationProperty": "to_TopicNatureDemo2/to_InvSpNature"
              }

entry.title: Re: How to export and deploy SAP HANA models for SAP Business One

Best regards,
Darius

entry.title: Re: Connect SAP on premise system with Google Drive so that we can call API's using ABAP
entry.content: To get the SSL certificate for https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files open it in a browser. Search the web for: download ssl certificate <name of your browser>.

entry.title: Re: ATP check for sto purchase orders
entry.content:
Hello,

to see it in the STO itself is quite simple: You select the item and press the button "Check Availability" below the item list (see screenshot below).

You will see the well-known delivery proposal screen, from where you can navigate to the check details.

Best regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: How to check c4c workflow rule activate and deactivat...
entry.content:
Dear Dhaval,

Good day 🙂

Currently there is no way to check for the Workflow Activation date in the frontend. But we have way to check the change log of the WKF in the backend.

If you have any issue with the WKF, please kindly raise a ticket to us, and we will check further.

Thanks and Regards,
Molly

Thanks,

Florian

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Updating Target API Level to 34 for Google Play Compliance
entry.content: Had the same issue - what I did is applied an extension from Google Play store so that my current builds won't be affected and will have more time to wait for SAP team to fix and apply new sdk.

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
Thank you @XaviPolo for the inputs.

I will explore on this function HASH_MD5() which I have not used before & apply.

Currently I have tried the below approach via Storedproc that seems to be working much faster than MINUS, JOIN operations.

Select D1,D2,D3,.....D50 , Sum(Amount_new) , Sum(Amount_OLD)

From 

(

Select D1,D2,D3,.....D50, Amount as Amount_new , 0 as Amount_Old from Table_New

Union All

Select D1,D2,D3,.....D50, 0 as Amount_New , Amount as  Amount_Old  as from Table_old

)

Group by D1,D2,D3,.....D50

Having  Sum(Amount_new) <>  Sum(Amount_old)

 

 

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: ATP check for sto purchase orders
entry.content: Hello Martin, Thankyou for the reply .i would like to see configuration or atp checks what are maintained in system  for sto purchase orders as i have working in cloud version is there a path for it to see same like sd atp checks

entry.content: Hi, any solution for the password protection issue for the migrationfiles.zip ?

entry.title: Re: Configuring the Internal Hiring/Crossboarding Process in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
With Future Manager setup, Onboarding Tasks are assigned to Future Manager to complete the tasks however the current hiring manager also could able to see these onboarding tasks on their dashboard however the current hiring managers will not able complete the tasks since those are not assigned to them. Is this expected behavior? Do we have any specific reference document for this? Please confirm.

 

Appreciate your support

entry.title: Re: Attachment in Purchase Order API
entry.content:
Hello Deepthi,

the question is not so easy to answer.

The question is, from where do you want to create the purchase order, i.e. do you send the purchase order to the SAP system from outside?

If this is the case, you must first authorise a connection from the SAP S/4HANA system to the outside, which in turn is security-critical. You also need to look at the best way to set this up and discuss it with the network team.

If you don't have this problem, you can set it up according to this blog:
Purchase Order via API_PURCHASEORDER_PROCESS_SRV - Example API-call

Regards
Jim

entry.title: Re: GR based invoice verification and Good receipt flag n...
entry.content: As you are creating the PO through automatic PO creation ME59N, check if the purchase info record is determined in the PR you have created and also confirm if both the fields are checked for that PIR in the concerned purchase org

entry.title: Re: Validating Mandatory fields in FPM Applications when clicking on SAVE button in toolbar
entry.content: This method Adds a * sign in front of the filed but does not raise error message when click save.. any further implementation has to done to raising error message

entry.title: Re: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content:
Dear @Wenny,

for reading stock information you can use Material Stock - Read | SAP Help Portal.

Communication Scenario is: Material Stock Integration (SAP_COM_0164).

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content: I got an idea through your answer. First, we will try to change the Static Buildpack to NGINX Buildpack, and in terms of setting up NGINX, we will try to restrict access. If this is not possible, I will try to upload a static file to the local directory of the approver. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to find the Transport request for table entry
entry.content: SCU3 in the target system worked beautifully for me, thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – Upgrade Faster – Why & When amend Roles with Obsolete or Depreca
entry.content:
Hi Jocelyn,

Just some real world feedback for you - I think it's important for people to know what SU25 will do and not just do it as, for example - SAP will happily remove an authorisation from SU24 for a transaction that you will need to manually add back (S_DATASET as an example breaking anyone doing things with server files), plus if you have a support role like I do (which has all catalogues in it, but not the underlying access so support can see everything without needing to assign all roles to themselves) - this would plain break the SoD in place by giving them all the required access (and potentially open authorisations that could be incorrectly filled.

Also, I've had a place where they separated authorisation into a different role from the underlying menus (pre-FLP days) - So this could break the authorisation model if run (albeit this should be considered legacy).

Do not underestimate the impact of running SU25 blindly - e.g. If I update a role in PFCG using the comparison functionality, I also check what will be added or removed as it may not be suitable.

Cheers,
Matt

entry.title: Re: Verify General Journal Entries - Configuration Steps in S/4HANA 1909
entry.content: Thank you very much for the step by step process

entry.title: ALV Cursor position
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement about alv cursor position but I faced a problem. I was able to Highlighted to cell using this code:

    DATA: ls_row    TYPE i,
          ls_value  TYPE c,
          ls_col    TYPE i,
          ls_row_id TYPE lvc_s_row,
          ls_col_id TYPE  lvc_s_col,
          es_row_no TYPE lvc_s_roid.

    CALL METHOD lo_alv->get_current_cell
      IMPORTING
        e_row     = ls_row
        e_value   = ls_value
        e_col     = ls_col
        es_row_id = ls_row_id
        es_col_id = ls_col_id
        es_row_no = es_row_no.
    IF ls_col = 1."next line
      ls_col_id = 'LGORT'.  "cursor will go this field.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->set_current_cell_via_id
        EXPORTING
          is_column_id = ls_col_id
          is_row_no    = es_row_no.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display
        EXPORTING
*          is_stable      =
          i_soft_refresh = abap_true
*        EXCEPTIONS
*          finished       = 1
*          others         = 2
        .
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
*       MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
*                  WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
      ENDIF.
    ELSE.
      ls_col_id = 'WERKS'.  "cursor will go this field.
      es_row_no-row_id = conv i( es_row_no-row_id ) + 1 .
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->refresh_table_display.
      CALL METHOD lo_alv->set_current_cell_via_id
        EXPORTING
          is_column_id = ls_col_id
          is_row_no    = es_row_no.
    ENDIF.

but cursor itself located top of screen where we enter tcode here is cursor position where its located:

How can I solve this problem.

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Public Edition / Error while dowloading XML Template in the Migrationcockpit
entry.content:
Hi Lucas,

please open an SAP Incident in component CA-LT-MC - this needs to be investigated by support team. In the incident include logon on data to your system, write if the problem only persist with the migration object customer or also with other objects.

Regards, Sybille

entry.title: Re: Transport migration cockpit project and objects in S4 Hana public cloud.
entry.content: Hi, we will remove the tag "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" as this tag is only used when there is no relevant sub-tag available.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

I’m Deepa Baskaran from India. As a returning mother, I have previous experience working on SAP Business Intelligence development projects, but I took a considerable break from the IT sector. During this time, I transitioned to teaching roles at higher academic institutions and also consistently upskilled myself with the latest tools and technologies, with a recent focus on cloud computing.

I’m truly inspired by this Digital Skills initiative, as it presents the perfect opportunity to upskill on the latest SAP technologies, get certified, and re-enter the SAP working community with confidence and a refreshed skill set. I look forward to leveraging this platform to support my career restart.
Thanks

entry.title: Re: how i can check price change history
entry.content:
Execute CKMPCSEARCH to get the price change document number for the material. Then execute CKMPCD to get the details.

You can also refer to:

Solved: MM Price Change history - SAP Community

How to check material price history of particular ... - SAP Community

entry.title: How can I check whether the token is expired?
entry.content:
Hi,

I am using sap bo rest services. Before calling the services I must get the logon token. So I am using /logon/long endpoint to get token but I am getting new token in every request so this is a problem. 

I want to get one token and use that token until it expires. So How can I learn how long the token expires? 

If I can learn how many minutes a token is valid for, I can record it in a table and check it. Or does anyone have a different suggestion?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I am Tu Nguyen from Vietnam

I want to improve myself in SAP and I am in "want to change mid-life career" category,

Thanks so much,

Tu

entry.title: Re: Error Creating Execution in AI Launchpad Using Docker Registry Secret
entry.content: Hello! assuming you have verified the namespace and the secret names are correct, I would ask you to provide the Argo Workflows RBAC configuration. Argos role are key, and you will find it here https://argo-workflows.readthedocs.io/en/latest/security/, make sure you have the apiGroups, resources and verbs correctly setup, then restart the argo workflows. Also, inspect the kubernetes events with "kubectl describe workflow <workflow-name> -n <namespace>" and paste results here

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Meetup Dortmund 05.09.2024
entry.content:
Hallo zusammen,

bin seit dem 02.09. ein Adessi und der GS Düsseldorf zugeordnet. Falls es passt komme ich gerne mal zum Stammtisch, aber für diese Woche muss ich leider absagen. War Mo./Di. in Dortmund und gestern in München bei den Welcome-Days. Den Rest der Woche ist Home-Office angesagt.

LG Berndt

entry.title: Re: DISPATCHER GRAY
entry.content:
Hello, 

in the dev_w* log there is the error:

Connect to database failed, rc=1, rcSQL=2

Check the configuration as described in KBA:

2961140 - SQLERRTEXT : general error: database 'SID' not connected

Regards, Alwina

entry.title: Re: T-code details to see Archived Maintenance Orders and Maintenance Notifications
entry.content: Hi, John. Do you also have any infomation to see archived PM notifications? The archive object is PM_QMEL and the PM notifications are displayed on Tr-cd IW23. However, after archiving the data, the data cannot be displayed anymore. I have been looking for the alternative ways such as different transaction code, report program or table which stores the archived data. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Project Billing for Customer Projects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Thanks, it is great !
unfortunately in our SAP demo system like E5Z AND EOT , i am not able to test these new recognition method, (P005 is still missing) i am a little bit surprise as these system have migrated in 2408
Could you indicate me a system available in which i would be able to test it ? 
Have a nice day

entry.title: Procedure on reassign solman custom role config with other custom role
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues,

we're using, as many others from you, the ZSOLMANPRO role config in SolMan.

Now, as i dont want to enhance my charm-coding that much to use the charm-standalones from FB, i'd rather be want to use a custom config of the /SALM/SM_PRO role.

Is there any procedure to follow on how to reassign custom roles?

I dont want to let the users choose between both roles before they start the Web-Ui.

regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: EWM Bulk Storage Type Setup, Putaway and Picking strategy

Hi @catherine_guang, Yes this should be available as this is SAP standard functionalities available.

Best Regards,

Anil

entry.title: Re: Custom checks to Business Partner external number
entry.content: Please let me know the approach you have followed for BP Number validation

entry.title: Tricentis Test Automation for SAP integrated with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced digital landscape, optimizing cloud-based workflows is essential for maintaining efficiency and productivity. Since it's been a while since my last post, I wanted to share some new tips I've recently discovered with you.This blog is going again into key tips for using TTA Cloud, focusing on its connection to SAP Cloud ALM, the reuse of modules, and the effective use of the output function. By understanding how to use these options, you can ease your way into the tool, and make the most out of TTA Cloud's capabilities. Let's explore how these tips can enhance your cloud experience.

The topic that will be discussed in the Blog:

  • How is TTA Connected to SAP Cloud ALM?
  • How to reuse modules
  • How to use the output function ?

 

 

How is TTA Cloud Connected to CALM?

When discussing the connection between the Agent and SAP Cloud ALM, it’s important to highlight that this integration uses advanced technologies like SignalR (WebSocket) and HTTPS to ensure real-time and secure communication. SignalR is particularly beneficial for creating applications that require frequent updates from the server without constantly polling, which is crucial for maintaining efficient and secure connections between TTA Cloud and SAP Cloud ALM.

SignalR simplifies adding real-time web functionality by allowing bidirectional communication between client and server. In this setup, when installing the team agent via the command line, sensitive keys are needed to establish a secure connection. These keys must be handled with care, ensuring they are kept secure on the client side. Once the agent is successfully connected to SAP Cloud ALM, TTA employs encryption methods to maintain the security of the connection. This means that customers do not need to store these sensitive keys after the connection is established, reducing the risk of potential security breaches.

This setup not only ensures the integrity of data being transmitted but also simplifies the user experience by automating the security processes involved in maintaining a secure connection. The use of SignalR allows for a smooth and continuous data flow, which is essential in environments where real-time updates are critical.

In summary, the combination of SignalR and HTTPS ensures a secure, reliable, and efficient connection between the Agent and SAP Cloud ALM, handling sensitive information with the highest security standards. This allows businesses to focus on their core operations without worrying about the complexities of maintaining a secure communication channel.

 

A tip for reusing modules effectively

Reusing modules can ease your workflow, especially when dealing with similar Apps. In SAP Cloud ALM for example, for me a similar page that comes to mind is the similarity of the tabs between creatinging a Task, a User Story, a Requirement or a Feature. All  start with a Title, Text format and Additional information is pretty similar. In this case obviously you don’t want to rescan over an over same tabs.

Example:

Suppose you have scanned a User Story creation and want to use this module for Tasks, Requirements, and other pages. Follow these steps:

  1. Open the already scanned module enter the edit mode.
  2. Delete the current Tab Title from the the “Indentification value” box and add below command: {REGEX[Tasks|Requirements|3rdtab|…etc]}. Add all the tab Titles you need this module for.

3. Save the module and re-use now the module.

Tip: To get the correct tab name, hover over the browser icon, and use the name displayed in full or just the first word followed by the star symbol.

 

 

How to Buffer (Copy and Paste) Values with TTA Cloud

When handling different processes, you might need to save the Document Number to use it later on for the creation of other Documents  (Example: the Purchase Requisition number for the creation of a Purchase Order). This can be achieved through buffering.

There are two ways to do this:

  • Using Action mode Output
  • Using Tosca Command

 

Action Mode Output

Using Output is simpler as it avoids the need to remember specific Tosca commands.

To Copy use the Output function and assign a name to the variable. For example, to copy the title of a Task in the example below I named my variable: e.g., "123".

To Paste use the Keyboard Standard command and refer to the variable name within curly brackets.

Using commands from Tosca:

Alternatively, you can use Tosca commands:

  • To buffer the value, use the command {XB[VariableName]} with the action mode set to verify

 

Conclusion

In conclusion, effectively leveraging the capabilities of Tricentis Test Automation (TTA) for SAP Cloud ALM can help your testing processes. By understanding how to establish secure, real-time connections using technologies like SignalR and HTTPS, reusing modules efficiently, and employing output functions for buffering values, you can enhance productivity and ensure robust testing outcomes. Feel free to reach out with any additional topics you'd like to explore.

entry.title: Ship-to address changes in deliveries and shipments already completed.
entry.content:
Hi,

I hope someone can help me with the following issue.

Our standard practice is to manually enter ship-to addresses for sales orders. This process triggers the creation of a new ADRNR, which is then propagated when creating subsequent documents.

Sometimes, after the completion of some deliveries, it may become necessary to modify the ship-to address specified on the order. This adjustment should apply only to outstanding deliveries, still, it's also affecting deliveries that have already been completed, which means we're losing the information about where those shipments actually went.

We're aware of a user exit that allows us to create a new ADRNR for the modification instead of changing the address for the current one. By creating a new ADRNR, we avoid affecting completed deliveries, but it doesn't change pending deliveries, which is a requirement.

Does anyone have experience with a similar issue or know how we can prevent this from happening?

Thanks in advance for your cooperation.

Ginno Giuffra

entry.title: Re: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO data return in internal table：lt_message
entry.content: Maybe it's normal, if there was no message at all. You must test SY-SUBRC too. See ABAP documentation of CALL TRANSACTION USING.

entry.title: Re: Custom checks to Business Partner external number
entry.content: Hi, we have the same requirement, how did you achieve this validation

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.1”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408.1 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you. A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

In this release, we will continue piloting the new Commenting Feature for What's New documentation. See this blog for more information.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 - Sales Order text line interface back to Deli...
entry.content:
@ANKIT_CHAUHANplease refer to the updated attachment above.

 

1. there is a SO created in SAP B1 with the list of content of item codes and text (Type = T)

2. Via SAP B1 API, interface  the list of Item to my inventory system on to process.

3. Interface back to SAP B1 to created a Delivery Note that referring back the SO.

4. But issue is the Text line all missing.

 

Please advise.

entry.title: Re: ALV Cursor position
entry.content: The focus was lost. Did you try cl_gui_control=>set_focus( lo_alv ). (+ handle classic exceptions)

entry.title: Re: When I use BDC TO CALL TRANSACTION VA05,There are NO...
entry.content: Besides, I have another question. If the batch update is executed, only the first one is successful, and the others are not updated successfully

entry.title: Re: ABAP Enterprise Service - RFC Consumer - Where maintain RFC Destination / Logical Port
entry.content: LP_CONFIG has been replaced by SOAMANAGER (although some clients still use LP_CONFIG instead of migrating to SOAMANAGER, sometimes data exist in both!) Where did you look in SOAMANAGER?

entry.title: Re: ALV Cursor position
entry.content: It didn't work, same problem goes on.

entry.title: A new data center is now available in Canada for SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
I am pleased to announce that we have just opened a new data center in Canada for SAP Cloud ALM extending our overall coverage.

It can be found in the SAP Trust Center:

List of available data centers for SAP Cloud ALM

When provisioning SAP Cloud ALM from SAP for Me, the new data center will be available for selection:

If your customer number is mapped to Canada, then the data center should be selected by default otherwise you can select if from the drop-down.

Enjoy!

entry.title: Re: Best approach to compare HANA Tables
entry.content:
Yes, anything columnar (like union) is faster.

Here you are not really comparing all fields, just the dimensions and a single measure (the aggregate).
If that's OK in your scenario, it's better than comparing all fields like MINUS does.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Remote Table dynamic filter pushdown
entry.content: @Zerosnow glad i could help 🙂

entry.title: Re: ABAP Enterprise Service - RFC Consumer - Where mainta...

i look in SOAMANAGER and in the Webservice Management and in the Design Time Cache I dont find my RFC Consumer. 

In SPROXY it is available

entry.title: Re: ABAP Enterprise Service - RFC Consumer - Where maintain RFC Destination / Logical Port
entry.content: Hi, i look in SOAMANAGER and in the Webservice Management and in the Design Time Cache I dont find my RFC Consumer. In SPROXY it is available

entry.title: Re: How to Implement Joule with SAC
entry.content:
Hi @LeonardoGarcia2 

i believe that SAP product management have plans to natively integrate a generative assistant into SAP Analytics Cloud's software service. 

You can see that marked as 'future product vision' on the roadmap here: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67838200100800006884&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=F1057575CA871EEE93AF5EE1D28134D1

Regards, H

entry.title: Details required on intelligent services
entry.content: Is it possible to configure in LMS through Intelligent services that system will identify employee "is first manager" in LMS so local admin team use that information and assign training to specific first time manager
